ground_truth.title: Find a Therapist Near You | Local Psychologists & Counsellors | TherapyRoute
with: Looking for qualified therapists? Find nearby psychologists, counselling, marriage and family therapists, social workers, and therapists in your area and online.
This page is designed to help users find therapists and mental health professionals in their local area.
The directory includes various types of mental health providers such as psychologists, counselors, and social workers.
Users can search for therapists both locally and online through this platform.
The service aims to connect people with qualified mental health professionals.
